Package io.foldright.inspectablewrappers

Interface Wrapper<T>

Type Parameters:
T - the type of instances that be wrapped
All Known Subinterfaces:
WrapperAdapter<T>
public interface Wrapper<T>
This Wrapper interface is used to be implemented by wrapper classes, make an inspectable wrapper chain(linked list).

Note about wrapper chain:

  • The wrapper chain consists of wrapper itself, followed by the wrappers obtained by repeatedly calling unwrap()
  • The last instance of wrapper chain is never type Wrapper
  • Uses the static methods in Inspector to inspect the wrapper chain
Author:
Jerry Lee (oldratlee at gmail dot com), Zava (zava dot kid at gmail dot com)

  • WrapperAdapter
  • Inspector

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    T
    unwrap()
    Returns the underlying instance that be wrapped.

  • Method Details

    • unwrap

      @NonNull T unwrap()
      Returns the underlying instance that be wrapped.

      this method also make the wrapper instances as a wrapper chain(linked list).
